scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,green "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w packages/server && S3_BUCKET= node --watch --env-file=.env packages/server/dist/server.js
scripts.dev:ui: VITE_USE_PROD_API=true VITE_DEV_AUTH_TOKEN= npm run dev -w packages/client
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/client && npm run build -w packages/server
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy -w packages/infra
